summary: M7-DESIGN-TOKENS-ASSET-SLOTS-001 is CLOSED after PR #177 passed required CI, merged, and origin/main advanced to 08127380716c1ef93d5849e92080e85400bc0fd4. The integrated work provides M7 presentation-only design tokens, neutral placeholder asset slots, map-renderer presentation tokens, Storybook evidence, and focused tests without changing authoritative simulation, protocol, save, Electron, dependencies, content-source, final art, or Human Gate scope.

tests_run.result: Quality, Web, and Browser Smoke passed; Windows Desktop Smoke Artifact passed.

tests_run.command: git fetch origin --prune; git checkout main; git pull --ff-only origin main; git log -1 --oneline --decorate

tests_run.result: M7-DESIGN-TOKENS-ASSET-SLOTS-001 was ACCEPTED on main before closure checkpoint; M7-APP-SHELL-QUALITY-001 and M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 were READY.
M7-APP-SHELL-QUALITY-001 and M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 are READY candidates.

decisions.decision: Mark M7-DESIGN-TOKENS-ASSET-SLOTS-001 CLOSED only after accepted commits entered origin/main through PR #177 and CI passed.
After closure, continue the M7 UI/localization quality track with M7-APP-SHELL-QUALITY-001 before the independent save/cloud boundary planning task, unless taskctl ready changes after closure merge.

risks.summary: The token/slot foundation is integrated but downstream app shell, map, inspector, appointment, guidance, and regression surfaces still need productization.
risks.mitigation: Start M7-APP-SHELL-QUALITY-001 after closure enters main and keep subsequent UI tasks scoped to their task files.

risks.summary: No production art or culture-specific asset is approved by this closed task.
risks.mitigation: Future asset replacement must preserve visual/cultural/historical/localization review gates.

requested_action: Merge this closure checkpoint, sync main, then start M7-APP-SHELL-QUALITY-001 as the highest-priority READY M7 UI/localization quality-track task unless taskctl ready changes.
